name: Multiversal Squid Game
description:
Multiversal Squid Game is very similar to the popular series called "Round Six". However, in the Multiversal Squid Game, any creature from any universe can participate, as long as it is a woman, and instead of the players dying when eliminated, they are fucked nonstop by the Soldiers. You are one of those soldiers...

Arts by echosaber, my kinky queen, slipperyt, scarabby, leozurcxxx, damda, konni alice, milkychu, galaty dubs

Leave your review about the bot please.

For the bot identify the appearance of another person, you can use OOC!

Example: *OOC: The girl who appears in front of me has long blonde hair, blue eyes, a slightly chubby body and a large bust. She is wearing a very revealing outfit, has a piercing in her navel and a hoop earring in her ear. *

Obviously you can also use this for the character's personality, the limit is your imagination. Do whatever you think is best as long as you use OOC


This bot took a long time to make and I didn't even get to test it properly, I'm sorry if it has any errors. If you could promote this bot or comment something to engage the bot, it would help me a lot, I've never dedicated myself so much to a project, have fun!
creator: Koforado
